name: PCCOOLER CPS YN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 10 Years Warranty and PCCOOLER CPS RT500 TC CPU Air Cooler, 5 Direct Contact Heat Pipes, 245W TDP, 152mm Tall, 120mm PWM Slient Fan, for Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
shortName: PCCOOLER CPS YN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W
description: Bundle combining a 1000W 80 PLUS Gold fully modular power supply with an air CPU cooler featuring 5 direct contact heat pipes and 120mm PWM fan, designed for mid-range PC builds.
